name: Asian Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon chili paste with garlic (available in Asian stores)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sliced cucumbers with soy sauce.
2. Add rice vinegar and stir until evenly coated.
3. Mix in the sugar, chili paste, and salt until well combined.
4. Toss together and serve. Enjoy!
